articles.title: SpaceX Wins $4 Billion Contract for US Golden Dome Satellites
articles.summary:
SpaceX has won a contract for more than $4 billion to build satellites to track foreign aircraft and missiles as part of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome defensive shield.
Bloomberg's Sana Pashank

articles.title: S&P 500 Powers Historic Weekly Run on US-Iran Bets: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks to a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.

articles.title: US Dollar’s May Rally Leaves Strategists Wary of More Gains

articles.title: Treasuries Trim Iran War Losses on Week as Oil Retreats
articles.summary: The US government bond market notched a weekly advance, recouping some of its losses since the start of the war on Iran, as oil prices declined in anticipation of an agreement to end the conflict.
